summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing for FinDash Phase 3. Backend APIs are 100% functional with real MongoDB data. Frontend partially integrated - OverviewSection uses real backend data, but CardsAccountsSection, InvestmentsSection, OtherSections (Receitas, Despesas, Categorias, Orçamento, Metas) still use MOCKED data from mockData.js.

passed_tests: Authentication with valid session token - 200 OK
GET /api/transactions/summary - Returns correct saldo calculation (receitas - despesas)
POST /api/transactions - Creates transaction and updates budget gasto
GET /api/cards - Returns cards with correct fatura_atual
Business Rule: fatura_atual = sum of unpaid installments - VERIFIED
POST /api/cards/installments/{id}/pay - Pays installment and recalculates fatura
GET /api/budgets - Returns user budgets with gasto values
Login page loads with Google OAuth button
Dashboard Overview loads with real data from MongoDB
Dashboard Summary cards show correct values (Saldo Total, Receitas, Despesas, Investimentos)
Sidebar navigation works across all sections

CardsAccountsSection.jsx (line 2): Still imports mockCards, mockCardInstallments, mockBankAccounts from mockData.js

seed_data_creation: Seed data exists for test_user_001 with categories, transactions, accounts, cards, installments, investments, budgets, and goals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional with 100% test pass rate. Frontend has partial integration - OverviewSection uses DataContext properly, but all other sections (OtherSections.jsx, CardsAccountsSection.jsx, InvestmentsSection.jsx) still use mockData.js. Main agent needs to refactor these files to use useData() hook from DataContext. After fixes, retest CRUD operations and business rule verification.

business_rules_verified.budget_gasto_calculation: VERIFIED - gasto = sum of paid despesas in category
